description_long: This is a modern bungalow set on a large, rectangular green plot bordered by trees and shrubs. The building features a flat, multi-level roof with clean lines and a combination of white and gray exterior walls. A driveway leads up to the main entrance, and there is a visible garage attached to the structure. The property includes a small blue pool or water feature adjacent to the house, and the landscaping is minimal with scattered trees and open grassy areas. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, open space, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and gray walls, set on a spacious, tree-lined green plot with a driveway and a small pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical tree-lined border.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, pool, and the elongated green lawn with scattered trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, more open lawn, and the driveway curving away from the house.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the pool, side of the house, and the extensive green space with trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
